body:
Byte-mirror of literature-template#51, which is merged and verified live there: site-page condition, left-column components un-gated so the landing shows the sidebar (tag pages keep exactly what they had), docs-explorer on site-page, and the GITHUB_REPOSITORY-gated GitHub icon link in the title card.

Verified locally: check + build pass, landing renders the sidebar with the GitHub icon.

title: Landing left sidebar + GitHub repo link (mirror of literature-template #51)
